options.label: 0 - Manual control only
options.description: Requires constant human control with no autonomous features

options.label: 1 - Assisted operation
options.description: Basic assistance features but requires human operation

options.label: 2 - Partial autonomy
options.description: Can perform some tasks autonomously but needs human oversight

options.label: 3 - Conditional autonomy
options.description: Autonomous in specific conditions or environments

options.label: 4 - High autonomy
options.description: Mostly autonomous, human intervention only in edge cases

options.label: 5 - Full autonomy
options.description: Completely autonomous operation without human intervention
